text: 一颗已经没有任何生命迹象的星球。
tags: #texten:A planet with no remaining signs of life.

text: 但科考队在这里探测到了巨大的人工建筑信号。
tags: #texten:But the expedition detected a massive artificial structure signal here.

text: 好壮观……这一定是某种文明建造的。
column5: #texten:Incredible... this must have been built by some civilization.

text: 灯还亮着，说明还有能源在运转。
column5: #texten:The lights are still on — there's still energy running.
